question: Return the names of friends of the high school student Kyle.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.name FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id JOIN Highschooler AS T3 ON T1.friend_id  =  T3.id WHERE T2.name  =  "Kyle"
predicted_sql: SELECT T3.col_2 FROM highschooler AS T1 JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 JOIN highschooler AS T3 ON T2.col_2 = T3.col_1 WHERE T1.col_2 = 'Kyle';
raw_response: SELECT T3.col_2 FROM highschooler AS T1 JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 JOIN highschooler AS T3 ON T2.col_2 = T3.col_1 WHERE T1.col_2 = 'Kyle';
